languages.text: "Перед вами сам{mf||а} {name} фон Валанциус, покоритель{mf||ница} Простора Коронус, властитель{mf||ница} Даргонуса, Януса и прочего бесчисленного множества миров. Склоните же головы в благоговении и трепете, ибо ни до, ни после этого момента вам не суждено лицезреть кого-то более великого!"

"Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"
languages.original_text: "Перед вами сам{mf||а} {name} фон Валанциус, покоритель{mf||ница} Простора Коронус, властитель{mf||ница} Даргонуса, Януса и прочего бесчисленного множества миров. Склоните же головы в благоговении и трепете, ибо ни до, ни после этого момента вам не суждено лицезреть кого-то более великого!"

traits.locale_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, Conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a countless multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and trepidation, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

"Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, Conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a countless multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and trepidation, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

"Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

"Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

"Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

languages.text: "Vor Euch steht {name} von Valancius {mf|Eroberer|Eroberin} der Koronus-Ausdehnung, {mf|Herrscher|Herrscherin} von Dargonus, Janus und zahllosen anderen Welten. Verneigt Euch in Ehrfurcht, denn Ihr werdet nach diesem Augenblick keinen erhabeneren Menschen treffen!"
languages.original_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

traits.locale_text: "Vor Euch steht {name} von Valancius {mf|Eroberer|Eroberin} der Koronus-Ausdehnung, {mf|Herrscher|Herrscherin} von Dargonus, Janus und zahllosen anderen Welten. Verneigt Euch in Ehrfurcht, denn Ihr werdet nach diesem Augenblick keinen erhabeneren Menschen treffen!"

languages.text: « Vous êtes en présence de l'illustre {name} von Valancius {mf|lui-même|elle-même}, {mf|conquérant|conquérante} des Étendues de Koronus et {mf|souverain|souveraine} de Dargonus, Janus et d'une myriade d'autres mondes. Prosternez-vous devant sa grandeur, car jamais plus vous n'aurez le privilège de contempler pareille majesté ! »
languages.original_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes en présence de l'illustre {name} von Valancius {mf|lui-même|elle-même}, {mf|conquérant|conquérante} des Étendues de Koronus et {mf|souverain|souveraine} de Dargonus, Janus et d'une myriade d'autres mondes. Prosternez-vous devant sa grandeur, car jamais plus vous n'aurez le privilège de contempler pareille majesté ! »

languages.text: «Están ustedes ante {name} von Valancius en persona, Conquistador{mf||a} de la Extensión de Koronus, Soberan{mf|o|a} de Dargonus, Janus y numerosos otros planetas. Inclínense en respeto y reverencia, pues ni antes ni después estarán ante alguien de mayor majestad!».
languages.original_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

traits.locale_text: «Están ustedes ante {name} von Valancius en persona, Conquistador{mf||a} de la Extensión de Koronus, Soberan{mf|o|a} de Dargonus, Janus y numerosos otros planetas. Inclínense en respeto y reverencia, pues ni antes ni después estarán ante alguien de mayor majestad!».

languages.text: "Karşınızda bizzat {name} von Valancius duruyor. Koronus Enginliği Fatihi; Dargonus, Janus ve diğer birçok dünyanın Hükümdarı. Huşu ve saygıyla başınızı eğin zira bugünden önce ondan yücesini görmemiştiniz, bugünden sonra da görmeyeceksiniz."
languages.original_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

traits.locale_text: "Karşınızda bizzat {name} von Valancius duruyor. Koronus Enginliği Fatihi; Dargonus, Janus ve diğer birçok dünyanın Hükümdarı. Huşu ve saygıyla başınızı eğin zira bugünden önce ondan yücesini görmemiştiniz, bugünden sonra da görmeyeceksiniz."

languages.text: “站在你们面前的是{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯本尊，科罗努斯扩区的征服者，达戈努斯、加努斯以及无数世界的统治者。低下头吧，心怀敬畏与崇敬，因为此时此景之后，你们注定再也无缘目睹比这更威严的存在！”
languages.original_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

traits.locale_text: “站在你们面前的是{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯本尊，科罗努斯扩区的征服者，达戈努斯、加努斯以及无数世界的统治者。低下头吧，心怀敬畏与崇敬，因为此时此景之后，你们注定再也无缘目睹比这更威严的存在！”

languages.text: 「目の前に立つのは、コーロナス・エクスパンスの征服者、ドラゴヌス、ヤヌス、そして無数の他の世界の支配者、ヴァランシウス家の{name}です。畏敬の念と敬意を込めて頭を下げてください。この瞬間の前後には、このほど偉大な存在に会う運命はありません！」
languages.original_text: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"

traits.locale_text: 「目の前に立つのは、コーロナス・エクスパンスの征服者、ドラゴヌス、ヤヌス、そして無数の他の世界の支配者、ヴァランシウス家の{name}です。畏敬の念と敬意を込めて頭を下げてください。この瞬間の前後には、このほど偉大な存在に会う運命はありません！」
